target:
(Right, after talking to Kaori-san,
we were going to exchange contact info…)

(At least Kaori-san is still alive…
That's the greatest relief)
(But if I keep doing this, I'll just repeat the same past again)

(Calm down, stop panicking.
I need to figure out what I should do from now on)

Kaori-san.
Where are you staying on the island?
Huh? A hotel on the island…?

W-wait a second!
Why the sudden question?

Well, it's just a regular inn.
Look, the <color=#GF_TIPS_041>brochure</color>.
The town hall staff prepared it…

(The town hall? Why would they…
Anyway, that's not important…)

Listen carefully, Kaori-san.
Don't go out at night under any circumstances!
S-someone suspicious is wandering around the island right now.

Yeah, it'll be too late if something happens.
So it's better not to go out.

O-okay, I get it.
I'll be careful.

(I don't know if she's really believing me,
but at least tonight will be…)
By the way… thank you, Shinpei.

I've been away from the island for a while,
so I was worried about everything.

So I was really happy that you were worried about me…
I felt safe.

A suspicious person… That's scary.
Yeah, I won't go out at night.
But don't worry too much, okay?

If anything happens,
this will protect me,
so it's okay!

Do you remember, Shinpei?
Look, the <color=#GF_KEY_KEYHOLDER>key holder</color>
of the character I've liked since I was little!

Ah, I haven't seen it in a while!
You still have it?

Welcome back, Shin-chan!! 
Long trip, you're exhausted, aren't you?!

(Oh right, at that time…
I thought I heard the sound of the tide)

(If that was the tide's wish,
what should I do now…)

Mio! Leave it to me!
I'll stop the bike!
(They jumped into the sea to save me…)

Both of you, I'm sorry.
For coming to save me…
No, I'm just glad you're safe.
(Instead of saving someone, I ended up being saved…)

(This isn't good!
This isn't how it's supposed to be…)
